news.title: STAT+: As Ebola outbreak in Central Africa grows, the U.S. turns itself into a fortress
news.summary: The U.S. is taking extraordinary steps to keep Ebola out. But its policies may create risks for Americans infected overseas and discourage volunteers from responding to the outbreak.

news.title: STAT+: Biotech veteran Jeremy Levin on why the industry’s future is secure, but American leadership is at risk
news.summary: Biotech is producing scientific breakthroughs that once seemed impossible. But according to longtime industry executive Jeremy Levin, the institutions that support these advances, from regulators, to investors, and even public…

news.title: Biotech exec Jeremy Levin on the industry’s strategic turning point
news.summary: This week on "The Readout LOUD," longtime biotech exec Jeremy Levin talks about his new book and the industry's strategic turning point. Listen now.

news.title: STAT+: Trump’s pharma deals get tested
news.summary: We still have a lot of questions about Trump's MFN deals with pharma companies.

news.title: Opinion: Ebola at the World Cup? Here’s what we should actually worry about
news.summary: “Infectious disease threats during the World Cup will almost certainly look much more familiar than frightening headlines suggest,” writes Krutika Kuppalli.

news.title: STAT+: Oura brings rings to the cuffless blood pressure party
news.summary: In this edition of STAT Health Tech: A new wave of blood pressure monitoring wearables, Stanford asking patients about AI, and more.

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a hepatitis B drug, CVS returns Lilly obesity drug to formularies, and more
news.summary: In this morning's Pharmalittle roundup, we're reading about a hepatitis B drug, CVS returns Lilly obesity drug to formularies, and more.

news.title: STAT+: Ahead of ASCO, all eyes on pancreatic cancer
news.summary: Strong results from GSK's hepatitis B drug, engineered heart patches, and more biotech news from The Readout

news.title: The latest developments on Ebola, hepatitis B, long Covid
news.summary: Uganda closes its border, a Christian substitute for insurance, and more health news from Morning Rounds

news.title: STAT+: Blood pressure tech floods the market after FDA relaxes wearables oversight
news.summary: Wearables with unvalidated blood pressure measuring tech are flooding the market after the FDA relaxed oversight of wellness devices.

news.title: STAT+: An ASCO preview: What to watch for at cancer research’s big meeting
news.summary: Here's what to watch for at ASCO, cancer research's big meeting, in Chicago.

news.title: STAT+: Trump’s drug-pricing deals set to be tested by new product launches
news.summary: The public is about to get its first look at the prices of drugs launched since President Trump struck his most-favored-nation deals with 17 drugmakers.

news.title: STAT+: Experimental hepatitis B treatment was a ‘functional cure’ for nearly 1 in 5, new data show
news.summary: An experimental GSK drug helped 1 in 5 patients with chronic hepatitis B achieve what's known as a functional cure, vastly outpacing current treatments.

news.title: STAT+: Heart patch engineered from stem cells revved up weakened hearts
news.summary: A stem cell-based heart patch improved pumping in a small trial for advanced heart failure. "Very good first step," researcher says.

news.title: Opinion: MIT president: Why so many optimistic scientists are losing heart
news.summary: “This erosion of our strength is a loss for the nation,” writes MIT President Sally Kornbluth.

news.title: Fierce Healthcare Layoff Tracker—Washington Regional's strategic consolidation cuts 86 employees; Care New England restructure hits 30+ jobs
news.summary: Stick with this tracker for the latest layoff and workforce updates from across healthcare.

news.title: Care navigation startup Garner Health banks $100M series E at $2.74B valuation
news.summary: The startup plans to use the capital to expand its provider quality platform, scale AI-powered product innovation and expand access.

news.title: HCA bolsters workforce pipeline with healthcare professional college acquisition
news.summary: Under the country's largest hospital chain, The College of Health Care Professions will be able to expand its offering of accredited programs and place its students in new clinical and externship positions across HCA.

news.title: Coalition for Health AI unveils governance playbooks for responsible AI adoption
news.summary: Each playbook includes suggested implementation guidance, tools, resources and examples for healthcare organizations to integrate into existing processes.

news.title: Penn Medicine, K Health partner to deploy AI clinical agents
news.summary: The agents will first be deployed across the system’s virtual urgent care program, with plans to expand to in-person primary care and certain specialties.

news.title: CVS restores coverage of Eli Lilly obesity med Zepbound, adds new pill Foundayo
news.summary: The top pharmacy benefit manager in the U.S., CVS Caremark, will restore coverage to obesity products from Eli Lilly, allowing a significant number of patients to gain access to the drugs through their existing insurance.

news.title: CMS finalizes changes to No Surprises Act dispute resolution process
news.summary: A new federal rule aims to overhaul the No Surprises Act protocols, particularly as large volumes of disputes are pushed to arbitration.

news.title: CVS expands partnership with Salesforce for greater call center personalization
news.summary: CVS Health is growing its partnership with Salesforce, leveraging its agentic AI-driven Agentforce Health to boost personalization in its call centers.

news.title: Teladoc Health inks partnership with Walmart to expand virtual care services
news.summary: Teladoc Health is expanding its retail partnerships with a new tie-up with Walmart to offer its virtual care services through the company's Better Care Services platform.

news.title: Hospitals again ask FTC, DOJ for exemption from expanded premerger notification filings
news.summary: As regulators explore an update to the Hart-Scott-Rodino form that would survive court scrutiny, the American Hospital Association argues that the existing process is doing the job.

news.title: Amazon taps Roy Schoenberg to lead healthcare business as Neil Lindsay plans to step down
news.summary: Amazon tapped digital health executive Roy Schoenberg, M.D., to lead its healthcare business as Neil Lindsay plans to step away from Amazon after 15 years.

news.title: Chutes & Ladders—KFF Founding President, CEO to retire; Visory Health promotes growth, tech execs
news.summary: Welcome to this week's Chutes & Ladders, our roundup of hirings, firings and retirings throughout the industry. Please submit the good news—or the bad—from your shop, and we will feature it here at the end of each week.

news.title: FDA extends Beren’s rare disease review after info request, further stretching saga
news.summary: The FDA has delayed its approval decision on Beren Therapeutics’ rare disease drug candidate, extending the asset’s long path toward the U.S. market.

news.title: Icon ends internal accounting investigation, finds it overstated revenue in prior years
news.summary: Irish CRO Icon has concluded its investigation into its accounting practices and restated its consolidated financials for 2023 and 2024.

news.title: Hoth Therapeutics’ pivot to AI in space sees stock rocket after rebrand
news.summary: Hoth Therapeutics’ search for salvation in the stars appears to have been rewarded by investors, as the company’s stock doubled after a pivot to powering AI in space.

news.title: Human Longevity launches newco, teams with Insilico for AI-powered longevity research
news.summary: Human Longevity, which is seeking to use biology and genomics to boost the human lifespan, has launched a new company called Human Life Foundation Models (HLFM) to help with its goal.

news.title: Novartis ‘always looking’ for further ways to shuttle drugs to brain despite run of recent deals
news.summary: Novartis may be launching an array of vehicles to shuttle drugs across the blood-brain barrier, but executives told Fierce the Swiss pharma is “always looking” for new ways to traverse this final frontier of neuroscience.

news.title: GSK’s hepatitis B drug cures one-fifth of patients in ‘major step’ for pervasive disease
news.summary: GSK is pulling back the curtain on the phase 3 success of its chronic hepatitis B drug bepirovirsen, revealing that nearly one-fifth of all treated patients across two trials were functionally cured of the virus.

news.title: Kordata Dynamics launches with neural-focused AI clinical trial model
news.summary: Kordata Dynamics is emerging from stealth with the aim to redefine clinical trial execution by processing neural data while taking advantage of the FDA’s recent push for real-time clinical trials.

news.title: D&D sees fibrosis improvements, MASH resolution after rolling dice on GLP-1 drug
news.summary: D&D Pharmatech has linked its GLP-1/glucagon receptor agonist to improvements in liver health, keeping the Korean biotech in the hunt for a market already served by Novo Nordisk’s Wegovy.

news.title: Insulet issues voluntary correction for Omnipod devices in leaky insulin fault
news.summary: Insulet has sent out a voluntary medical device correction notice for a series of its Omnipod devices amid a manufacturing fault that could lead to insulin leaking and not being fully delivered.

news.title: Apogee bags $1.3B Blackstone royalty funding deal to push eczema challenger into phase 3
news.summary: Apogee Therapeutics has secured a promise of up to $1.3 billion in financing from Blackstone Life Sciences as the biotech gears up to take its anti-IL-13 antibody into phase 3.

news.title: Dexcom warns of stolen glucose monitors being sold by unauthorized dealers
news.summary: Dexcom warned that some lots of its G7 wearable glucose monitors were stolen on their way to the scrapyard and were sold by a third-party vendor.

news.title: Kardigan itching for IPO to fund late-stage cardiovascular pipeline
news.summary: Kardigan may have only launched last year, but it seems the cardiovascular-focused biotech is already eyeing the public markets.

news.title: 教皇发布首份AI通谕：4万字10个观点，AI焦虑被说透了
news.summary: 句句提 AI，字字在说人。

papers.title: When Should Models Change Their Minds? Contextual Belief Management in Large Language Models
papers.summary: Long-horizon interactions require language models to manage accumulating information: when to update their state, when to preserve their state, and what to ignore. We study this challenge as Contextual Belief Management (CBM): maintaining a predicted belief state aligned with formal evidence while isolating task-irrelevant noise. To make CBM measurable, we introduce BeliefTrack, a closed-world benchmark spanning Rule Discovery and Circuit Diagnosis, where a finite belief space and symbolic verifiers enable exact turn-level evaluation. BeliefTrack diagnoses three failures: Failed Stay, Failed U
